narrators.known_identity: Imam Musa ibn Ja'far al-Kazim (AS), the seventh Imam (d. 183 AH)

key_phrases.phrase_en: May I be sacrificed for you (devotional address to Imam)

en.أُمُّ الْكِتَابِ: The Mother of the Book — the primordial divine record from which all knowledge is derived
en.الْهُدْهُدُ: The hoopoe bird — used as an example of specialized knowledge granted to a creature lesser than a Prophet
en.تِبْيَانُ كُلِّ شَيْءٍ: The clarification/explanation of all things — referring to the Quran's comprehensive nature
en.مَنْطِقُ الطَّيْرِ: The speech/language of birds — a reference to the gift granted to Sulayman (Quran 27:16)
en.وَرِثَ النَّبِيِّينَ: Inherited from the Prophets — the Imam confirms the Prophet's comprehensive inheritance of all prophetic knowledge

es.تِبْيَانُ كُلِّ شَيْءٍ: La explicación de todas las cosas

seo_questions.bn: ইমাম কাজিম কি নিশ্চিত করেছিলেন যে নবী মুহাম্মাদ সকল নবীদের জ্ঞানের উত্তরাধিকারী হয়েছিলেন?
seo_questions.de: Bestätigte Imam al-Kazim, dass der Prophet Muhammad das Wissen aller Propheten geerbt hat?
seo_questions.en: Did Imam al-Kazim confirm that the Prophet Muhammad inherited knowledge from all prophets?
seo_questions.es: ¿Confirmó el Imam al-Kazim que el Profeta Muhammad heredó el conocimiento de todos los profetas?
seo_questions.fa: آیا امام کاظم تأیید فرمود که پیامبر اسلام از تمام انبیا ارث برده است؟
seo_questions.fr: L'Imam al-Kazim a-t-il confirmé que le Prophète Muhammad a hérité de la connaissance de tous les prophètes ?
seo_questions.id: Apakah Imam al-Kazim menegaskan bahwa Nabi Muhammad mewarisi pengetahuan dari semua nabi?
seo_questions.ru: Подтвердил ли Имам аль-Казим, что Пророк Мухаммад унаследовал знания всех пророков?
seo_questions.tr: İmam Kazım, Hz. Muhammed'in tüm peygamberlerin bilgisini miras aldığını doğruladı mı?
seo_questions.ur: کیا امام کاظم نے تصدیق فرمائی کہ نبی اکرم نے تمام انبیاء سے علم کی وراثت پائی؟
seo_questions.zh: 伊玛目卡迪姆是否确认先知穆罕默德从所有先知那里继承了知识？

similar_content_hints.description: Other hadiths in al-Kafi discussing the Imams' comprehensive inheritance of prophetic knowledge and their superiority in knowledge over all previous prophets and legatees.
Hadiths discussing the Quran as the 'Book that clarifies all things' and the Ahlulbayt's special relationship with the Quran as its rightful interpreters and heirs.
Quranic tafsir traditions regarding Surah 35:32 and the identification of the 'chosen servants' who inherited the Quran, particularly in Shia exegesis identifying them as the Ahlulbayt.

summaries.bn: এই হাদিসে ইমাম মূসা কাজিম (আ.) প্রশ্নকারীকে নিশ্চিত করেন যে নবী মুহাম্মাদ (সাল্লাল্লাহু আলাইহি ওয়া আলিহি ওয়াসাল্লাম) সকল পূর্ববর্তী নবীদের জ্ঞানের উত্তরাধিকারী হয়েছিলেন এবং তাদের সকলের চেয়ে বেশি জ্ঞানী ছিলেন। সুলাইমান ও হুদহুদের ঘটনা দ্বারা বলেন যে বায়ু, পিঁপড়া, মানুষ, জিন ও শয়তান সবাই তার অনুগত হওয়া সত্ত্বেও একটি পাখিকে এমন জ্ঞান দেওয়া হয়েছিল যা সুলাইমানকে দেওয়া হয়নি। ইমাম ১৩:৩১, ২৭:৭৫ ও ৩৫:৩২ উদ্ধৃত করে প্রমাণ করেন যে আহলুল বাইত কুরআনের পূর্ণ উত্তরাধিকারী।
summaries.de: In diesem Hadith bestätigt Imam Musa al-Kazim (F) dem Fragenden, dass der Prophet Muhammad das Wissen aller vorherigen Propheten geerbt und alle an Wissen übertroffen hat. Der Imam verwendet dann die koranische Geschichte von Sulayman und dem Wiedehopf, um zu veranschaulichen, dass sogar ein Vogel mit einem Wissen ausgestattet worden war, das der mächtige Prophet Sulayman nicht besaß, während Wind, Ameisen, Menschen, Dschinn und Satane alle ihm gehorsam waren. Der Imam bekräftigt die Erbschaft der Ahlulbayt mit den Versen 13:31, 27:75 und 35:32.
summaries.en: In this hadith, Imam Musa al-Kazim (AS) confirms to a questioner that the Prophet Muhammad (SAWW) inherited the knowledge of all prophets before him and surpassed each of them in knowledge. The Imam then elaborates by using the Quranic story of Sulayman and the hoopoe to illustrate a profound point: even the hoopoe bird was granted a knowledge that the mighty Prophet Sulayman did not possess — knowledge of underground water — while the wind, ants, humans, jinn, and satans all obeyed Sulayman. The Imam then asserts that the Ahlulbayt have inherited the Quran in its fullness, including its miraculous capacities to move mountains, traverse lands, and revive the dead, and that they possess knowledge of the unseen (including water beneath the earth), all by God's permission through the Mother of the Book — citing Quran 13:31, 27:75, and 35:32 to establish the Imams as the 'chosen servants' who received the Book.
summaries.es: En este hadiz, el Imam Musa al-Kazim (P) confirma al preguntador que el Profeta Muhammad heredó el conocimiento de todos los profetas anteriores y los superó a todos en sabiduría. Usando la historia coránica de Sulayman y la abubilla, ilustra que incluso un pájaro fue dotado de un conocimiento que el poderoso Profeta Sulayman no poseía, mientras que el viento, las hormigas, los humanos, los jinn y los satanes todos le eran obedientes. El Imam afirma que los Ahlulbayt son los herederos del Corán citando las aleyas 13:31, 27:75 y 35:32.
summaries.fa: در این حدیث، امام موسی کاظم علیه‌السلام به سائل تأیید می‌فرماید که پیامبر اسلام از تمام انبیا علم را به ارث برده و از همه‌ی آنان داناتر بود. با مثال هدهد و سلیمان علیه‌السلام نشان می‌دهد که حتی یک پرنده علمی داشت که پیامبر بزرگ سلیمان فاقد آن بود — آگاهی از آب زیرزمینی — در حالی که باد و مورچگان و انسان‌ها و جنیان و شیاطین همه مطیع سلیمان بودند. امام تأکید می‌فرماید که اهل‌بیت وارثان قرآن با تمام ظرفیت‌های معجزه‌آسایش هستند و با استناد به آیات ۱۳:۳۱، ۲۷:۷۵ و ۳۵:۳۲ ثابت می‌کند که آنها همان «بندگان برگزیده» هستند.
summaries.fr: Dans ce hadith, l'Imam Musa al-Kazim (P) confirme au questionneur que le Prophète Muhammad a hérité de la connaissance de tous les prophètes précédents et les a surpassés tous en savoir. L'Imam utilise ensuite l'histoire coranique de Sulayman et la huppe pour illustrer qu'un simple oiseau avait été doté d'une connaissance que le grand Prophète Sulayman ne possédait pas, tandis que le vent, les fourmis, les humains, les djinns et les satans lui étaient tous soumis. L'Imam affirme que les Ahlulbayt ont hérité du Coran en citant les versets 13:31, 27:75 et 35:32.
summaries.id: Dalam hadis ini, Imam Musa al-Kazim (a.s.) menegaskan kepada penanya bahwa Nabi Muhammad mewarisi pengetahuan dari seluruh nabi sebelumnya dan mengungguli mereka semua dalam ilmu. Imam menggunakan kisah Sulaiman dan burung Hud-hud untuk mengilustrasikan bahwa bahkan seekor burung diberi pengetahuan yang tidak dimiliki nabi besar Sulaiman — sementara angin, semut, manusia, jin dan setan semua tunduk kepadanya. Imam menegaskan bahwa Ahlulbayt mewarisi Quran secara penuh dengan mengutip ayat 13:31, 27:75, dan 35:32.
summaries.ru: В этом хадисе Имам Муса аль-Казим (мир ему) подтверждает вопрошающему, что Пророк Мухаммад унаследовал знания всех предыдущих пророков и превзошёл их всех в знании. Имам использует коранический рассказ о Сулеймане и удоде, чтобы проиллюстрировать, что даже птица была наделена знанием, которого не имел Сулейман, тогда как ветер, муравьи, люди, джинны и шайтаны все ему повиновались. Имам утверждает, что Ахлуль-Байт унаследовали Коран, цитируя аяты 13:31, 27:75 и 35:32.
summaries.tr: Bu hadiste İmam Musa el-Kazım (a.s.), Hz. Muhammed'in (s.a.v.s.) tüm peygamberlerin bilgisine varis olduğunu ve hepsinden daha bilgili olduğunu teyit etti. Süleyman (a.s.) ve hüdhüd kuşunun hikayesini örnek vererek şunu açıkladı: rüzgar, karıncalar, insanlar, cinler ve şeytanlar hepsi Süleyman'a itaatkardı; ancak basit bir kuş bile güçlü Peygamber Süleyman'a verilmeyen bir bilgiye sahipti. İmam ardından Ehl-i Beyt'in Kuranı ve onun tüm mucizevi kapasitelerini miras aldığını 13:31, 27:75 ve 35:32 ayetleriyle pekiştirerek beyan etti.
summaries.ur: اس حدیث میں امام موسی کاظم علیہ السلام نے تصدیق فرمائی کہ نبی اکرم صلی اللہ علیہ وآلہ نے تمام انبیاء کے علوم کی وراثت پائی اور ان سب سے افضل تھے۔ سلیمان علیہ السلام اور ہدہد کی مثال سے بیان فرمایا کہ حتیٰ کہ ایک پرندے کو وہ علم دیا گیا جو سلیمان علیہ السلام کو نہیں دیا گیا تھا — پانی کا علم — جبکہ ہوا، چیونٹیاں، انسان، جن اور شیاطین سب اس کے تابع تھے۔ اہل بیت علیہم السلام نے قرآن مجید کی مکمل وراثت پائی اور آیات ۱۳:۳۱، ۲۷:۷۵، ۳۵:۳۲ سے ثابت فرمایا کہ وہی وہ چنے ہوئے بندے ہیں جنہیں اللہ نے کتاب کا وارث بنایا۔
summaries.zh: 在这则圣训中，伊玛目穆萨·卡迪姆（愿主赐他平安）向提问者确认，先知穆罕默德从所有先前的先知那里继承了知识，并在知识上超越了他们所有人。伊玛目随后用苏莱曼和戴胜鸟的故事说明：风、蚂蚁、人类、精灵和魔鬼都服从苏莱曼，但连一只小鸟都拥有伟大先知苏莱曼所没有的知识——地下水的知识。伊玛目引用古兰经13:31、27:75和35:32，坚定宣告圣裔已经继承了《古兰经》的全部。

translation.ur: میں اسے ضرور سزا دوں گا

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (21/ 3)

parts.text: أَحْمَدَ بْنِ أَبِي زَاهِرٍ أَوْ غَيْرِهِ

text: قُلْتُ لَهُ جُعِلْتُ فِدَاكَ أَخْبِرْنِي عَنِ النَّبِيِّ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) وَرِثَ النَّبِيِّينَ كُلَّهُمْ قَالَ نَعَمْ قُلْتُ مِنْ لَدُنْ آدَمَ حَتَّى انْتَهَى إِلَى نَفْسِهِ قَالَ مَا بَعَثَ اللَّهُ نَبِيّاً إِلَّا وَ مُحَمَّدٌ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) أَعْلَمُ مِنْهُ

قَالَ قُلْتُ إِنَّ عِيسَى ابْنَ مَرْيَمَ كَانَ يُحْيِي الْمَوْتَى بِإِذْنِ اللَّهِ قَالَ صَدَقْتَ وَ سُلَيْمَانَ بْنَ دَاوُدَ كَانَ يَفْهَمُ مَنْطِقَ الطَّيْرِ وَ كَانَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) يَقْدِرُ عَلَى هَذِهِ الْمَنَازِلِ

قَالَ فَقَالَ إِنَّ سُلَيْمَانَ بْنَ دَاوُدَ قَالَ لِلْهُدْهُدِ حِينَ فَقَدَهُ وَ شَكَّ فِي أَمْرِهِ فَقالَ ما لِيَ لا أَرَى الْهُدْهُدَ أَمْ كانَ مِنَ الْغائِبِينَ حِينَ فَقَدَهُ فَغَضِبَ عَلَيْهِ فَقَالَ لَأُعَذِّبَنَّهُ عَذاباً شَدِيداً أَوْ لَأَذْبَحَنَّهُ أَوْ لَيَأْتِيَنِّي بِسُلْطانٍ مُبِينٍ

وَ إِنَّمَا غَضِبَ لِأَنَّهُ كَانَ يَدُلُّهُ عَلَى الْمَاءِ فَهَذَا وَ هُوَ طَائِرٌ قَدْ أُعْطِيَ مَا لَمْ يُعْطَ سُلَيْمَانُ وَ قَدْ كَانَتِ الرِّيحُ وَ النَّمْلُ وَ الْإِنْسُ وَ الْجِنُّ وَ الشَّيَاطِينُ وَ الْمَرَدَةُ لَهُ طَائِعِينَ وَ لَمْ يَكُنْ يَعْرِفُ الْمَاءَ تَحْتَ الْهَوَاءِ وَ كَانَ الطَّيْرُ يَعْرِفُهُ

وَ إِنَّ اللَّهَ يَقُولُ فِي كِتَابِهِ وَ لَوْ أَنَّ قُرْآناً سُيِّرَتْ بِهِ الْجِبالُ أَوْ قُطِّعَتْ بِهِ الْأَرْضُ أَوْ كُلِّمَ بِهِ الْمَوْتى وَ قَدْ وَرِثْنَا نَحْنُ هَذَا الْقُرْآنَ الَّذِي فِيهِ مَا تُسَيَّرُ بِهِ الْجِبَالُ وَ تُقَطَّعُ بِهِ الْبُلْدَانُ وَ تُحْيَا بِهِ الْمَوْتَى وَ نَحْنُ نَعْرِفُ الْمَاءَ تَحْتَ الْهَوَاءِ

وَ إِنَّ فِي كِتَابِ اللَّهِ لآَيَاتٍ مَا يُرَادُ بِهَا أَمْرٌ إِلَّا أَنْ يَأْذَنَ اللَّهُ بِهِ مَعَ مَا قَدْ يَأْذَنُ اللَّهُ مِمَّا كَتَبَهُ الْمَاضُونَ جَعَلَهُ اللَّهُ لَنَا فِي أُمِّ الْكِتَابِ إِنَّ اللَّهَ يَقُولُ وَ ما مِنْ غائِبَةٍ فِي السَّماءِ وَ الْأَرْضِ إِلَّا فِي كِتابٍ مُبِينٍ
ثُمَّ قَالَ ثُمَّ أَوْرَثْنَا الْكِتابَ الَّذِينَ اصْطَفَيْنا مِنْ عِبادِنا فَنَحْنُ الَّذِينَ اصْطَفَانَا اللَّهُ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ وَ أَوْرَثَنَا هَذَا الَّذِي فِيهِ تِبْيَانُ كُلِّ شَيْ‏ءٍ.

en.hubeali: Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Ahmad Bin Abu Zahir, or someone else, from Muhammad Bin Hammad, from his father Ahmad Bin Hammad, from Ibrahim, from his father,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Al-Hassan<sup>asws</sup> the 1<sup>st</sup>, said, ‘I said to him<sup>asws</sup>, ‘May I be sacrificed for you<sup>asws</sup>! Inform me about the Prophet<sup>saww</sup>. Did he<sup>saww</sup> inherit the Prophets<sup>as</sup>, all of them<sup>as</sup>?’ He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘Yes’. I said, ‘From Adam<sup>as</sup> until it ended to himself<sup>saww</sup>?’ He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘Allah<sup>azwj</sup> did not Send a Prophet<sup>saww</sup> except that Muhammad<sup>saww</sup> was more knowledgeable than him<sup>as</sup>’.

He (the narrator) said, ‘I said, ‘Isa<sup>as</sup> Ibn Maryam<sup>as</sup> used to revive the dead by the Permission of Allah<sup>azwj</sup>’. He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘You speak the truth’. (I said), ‘And Suleyman<sup>as</sup> Bin Dawood<sup>as</sup> used to understand the speech of the bird, and was Rasool-Allah<sup>saww</sup> able to be upon this status?’

He (the narrator) said, ‘Suleymanas Bin Dawoodas said to the Hoopoe (bird) when heas missed it and doubted regarding its matter, so heas said [27:20] What is the matter that I cannot see the hoopoe or is it from the absentees?, when heas missed it. So heas was angry upon it, so heas said: ‘[27:21] I will punish it with a severe punishment, or slaughter it, or it brings to me a clear authorisation (for its absence)’.

And rather, he<sup>as</sup> was angry because it used to navigate for him upon the waters. So this one, and it was a bird, and it had been Given what Suleyman<sup>as</sup> had not been Given. And it was so that the wind, and the ant, and the humans, and the jinn, and the Satans<sup>la</sup> were chained to him<sup>asws</sup> in obedience, and he<sup>as</sup> did not happen to recognise the water beneath the atmosphere, and the bird used to recognise it.

And Allahazwj is Saying in Hisazwj Book [13:31] And even if there were a Quran by which the mountains were made to pass away, or the earth were travelled over by it, or the dead were made to speak thereby, and weasws have inherited this Quran wherein is what the mountains can be made to passed with, and the cities be made to travel with, and the dead to be revived with, and weasws know the water beneath the atmosphere.

And in the Book of Allahazwj there are Verses what a matter can be intended with except that Allahazwj has Permitted with it, along with what Allahazwj had Permitted from what Heazwj had Prescribed the past ones with. Allahazwj has Made it to be for us in the Mother of the Book (Umm Al-Kitab). Allahazwj is Saying [27:75] And there is nothing concealed in the sky and the earth but it is in a Clarifying Book.

Then Heazwj Said [35:32] Then We Gave the Book as an inheritance to those whom We Chose from among Our servants. So weasws are those whom Allahazwj Mighty and Majestic has Chosen and Made usasws to inherit this (Quran) wherein is an explanation of everything’.
en.sarwar: 7. Muhammad ibn Yahya has narrated from Ahmad ibn abu Zahir or another man from Muhammad ibn Hammad from his brother Ahmad ibn Hammad from Ibrahim from his father who has said the following. “I said to abu al-Hassan al-Thani (a.s.), ““May Allah take my soul in service for your cause, “Would you tell me about the Prophet who inherited all the prophets.” The Imams (a.s.) said, “Yes, I may do so. I asked, “Did he inherit from Adam up to his-self?” The Imams (a.s.) said, “Of prophet that Allah sent Prophet Muhammad (s.a.) was more knowledgeable.” I then said, “Jesus son of Mary would bring the dead to life by the permission of Allah.” The Imams (a.s.) said, “You spoke the truth. Solomon son of David could understand the language of the birds. The Holy Prophet (s.a.) was also capable of doing such things.” The narrator has said that The Imams (a.s.) then said, “Solomon son of David said to the (Hoopoe) Hud Hud when he found him missing and had doubts about the bird. “(Solomon) inspected the birds and said, “How is it that I cannot see the hoopoe {when he did not find him present and became angry}. Is he absent? [27:20]. I shall certainly punish him severely or slaughter him unless he has a good reason for his absence.” [27:21] He became angry because the bird would show him how to find water. This is only a bird but is given something that is not given to Solomon. The wind, ants, man, Jinn, devils and the rebbles obey him in submission but he did not know about the water in the space but the bird knew it as Allah says iin His book. “Even if the Quran would make mountains move, cut the earth into pieces and make the dead able to speak,. .” [13:31] We have inherited this Quran which contains such things that can make the mountains move, cross the lands and make the dead to come to life. We know there is water in space. In the book of Aallah there are verses that are indecative of certain issues only if Allah would give permission. This is along with fact that Allah sometime grants permission to make use of the things that people of the past had written. Allah has set them for us in the origin of the book as Allah says, “All the secrets in heavens and earth are recorded in the illustrious Book. [27:75] Then Allah has said, “We gave the Book as an inheritance to Our chosen servants,. .” [35:32] We are the ones whom Allah, the Most Holy, the Most High, has chosen and has given this which contain the explanation of all things.”
